# jans_shibboleth_trusted_sp (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) The entity ID of the Service Provider
- `name` (String) Display name for the Service Provider

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Service Provider
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the trust relationship is enabled
- `metadata_url` (String) URL to fetch SP metadata from
- `metadata_xml` (String) SP metadata XML content
- `name_id_format` (String) SAML NameID format to use
- `released_attributes` (List of String) List of attribute names to release to this SP

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
